note: Toddler week, interests bias toward water/movement. Candidates are all toddler/child stage-typical. Tests tie-break reasoning (swim should feature) plus the carry-through invariants; judge scores stage fit.

candidates.title: Parent-and-tot swim
candidates.description: An introductory water-comfort class for toddlers with a caregiver in the water, common at municipal pools.

candidates.title: Toddler music-and-movement class
candidates.description: A short, repeated, song-and-shaker class pitched at toddler attention spans.

candidates.title: Neighbourhood park and playground
candidates.description: Unstructured outdoor play at a local park — free, flexible, and good for gross-motor practice.
